channel.title: +MT on आगमे शैवे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः
channel.description: Recent content in +MT on आगमे शैवे विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: MaThas
item.description: Haradih Today we shall look at the obscure village of Haradih which was a saiddhAntika shaiva kShetra that has never been properly described. It is near Ranchi in Jharkhand as show in the map. Likely patronized by pAla-s in they heydays. H have made a come back here but have forgotten how to build. First if we zoom in we see that the ruins are beside the compound of modern durgA mandir built from concrete with three spires.
